items.title: Man dies in storm as Saharan dust shrouds Crete
items.summary: A man dies in flooding near Athens as rain lashes several regions in Greece, while a Saharan dust storm enveloped Crete.

items.title: 'Be serious... don't speak every day': Macron criticises Trump approach to Iran war
items.summary: The comments were an apparent jab at the US leader's sometimes contradictory stance on the US-Israeli war against Iran.

items.title: Brazil grants joint custody over pets in new law for separated couples
items.summary: Lawmakers in the Brazilian Congress view the law change as a reflection of pets' importance for their owners.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 革命衛隊列恐怖組織衝突延燒 阿根廷驅逐伊朗臨時代辦
items.summary: 阿根廷外交部今（2日）宣布伊朗臨時代辦德黑蘭尼（Mohsen Tehrani）為「不受歡迎人物」（persona non grata），要求他在48小時內離境。此舉是阿根廷政府針...…

items.title: 伊朗百年醫學機構被擊中 批美以「直接攻擊國際健康安全」
items.summary: 伊朗政府官員2日表示，美國和以色列的攻擊，擊中該國其中一所首屈一指的醫藥健康研究機構，並稱這是對「國際健康安全的直接攻擊」。  《美國有線電視新聞網》（CNN）2日報導，伊...…

items.title: 川普與歐洲盟友鬧僵 英相施凱爾喊話：北約效力世界之最
items.summary: 美國總統川普因伊朗戰爭與荷姆茲海峽問題，與北大西洋公約組織（NATO）鬧僵。英國首相施凱爾強調，工黨政府全心投入北約運作，讚揚其為「全世界所見識到的單一最具效力軍事同盟」。為了...…
